title: Session capture report makes observation distillation visible
summary: Kage now exposes privacy scanned observation sessions through kage sessions, the kage sessions MCP tool, and the viewer Memory page. This is the Kage alternative to session-memory raw session replay: show observed ses
body: Kage now exposes privacy-scanned observation sessions through kage sessions, the kage_sessions MCP tool, and the viewer Memory page. This is the Kage alternative to session-memory raw session replay: show observed sessions, durable distillation candidates, and the exact kage distill action while keeping raw transcript replay out of the product surface.

context.fact: Kage now exposes privacy-scanned observation sessions through kage sessions, the kage_sessions MCP tool, and the viewer Memory page. This is the Kage alternative to session-memory raw session replay: show observed sessions, durable distillation candidates, and the exact kage distill action while keeping raw transcript replay out of the product surface.
